race.description: Max speed bonus added to a 1st-place finish
Speed bonus lost per second of race time

Fraction of the prize paid on each back-to-back win (anti-farm). INERT today: the 1x/in-game-day lock blocks a second completion the same day, and the ~8-min in-game day exceeds repeatWinRecoverSec so the streak always resets. Kept tunable for a future same-day-repeatable race.
Seconds away from the race to recover one anti-farm decay step. (Inert under the 1x/day lock — see repeatWinDecay.)
Start countdown before the race begins

boatRace.description: Max speed bonus added to a 1st-place finish (higher than the land races to pay for the mine hazards)

Start countdown before the race begins

taxi.description: Fare added per meter of pickup-to-dropoff distance
Tip added per meter of trip distance
Hard cap on a single ride's total payout (fare + tip)
Base time allowed to reach the drop-off
Extra drop-off time = trip distance divided by this
Seconds before a wrecked cab returns to the stand

carCrusher.description: Minimum scrap payout per crushed car
Maximum scrap payout per crushed car

vigilante.description: Cash per suspect busted, multiplied by patrol level
Hard cap on a single bust payout (perBust * level)
Seconds added to the clock per capture
Minimum interval between two ram hits
Seconds before a wrecked cruiser returns

paramedic.description: Cash bonus multiplied by the level on delivery
Hard cap on a single delivery payout (perPatient*onboard + perLevel*level)
Extra time added per level number
Seconds before a wrecked ambulance returns

firefighter.description: Cash per fire put out, multiplied by level
Quick-extinguish bonus lost per second on the fire
Hard cap on a single fire payout (perLevel*level + speed bonus)
Extra time granted per meter to the fire
Floor on the time granted per fire
Ceiling on the time granted per fire
Extra grace time on the very first fire
Below this the HUD clock flashes red and beeps
Seconds before a wrecked fire truck returns

stuntJump.description: Cash per jump = jump speed times this
Cap on a single stunt's speed value
Discovery bonus the first time a ramp is cleared
Lockout after landing before another takeoff
Seconds between repeat payouts on the same ramp (anti-farm)

importExport.description: Minimum base payout for an exported car
Random amount (0..this) added to the base payout
Bonus when the car matches the requested model

rcToyz.description: The gold car pays perKill times this
Wreck-chain cash multipliers, scanned top-down; below the lowest minCombo pays x1
Hard cap on a single wreck's cash after combo/gold multipliers
Seconds added when wrecking the gold car
Time window in which wrecks chain into a combo
Seconds before a used crate respawns
Seconds a TIME crate adds to the clock
Duration of the MEGA BLAST buff
How long a car scatters when the RC gets close

weedFarm.description: Base cash per bud, before strain value and market
City/street buyers pay this times the rural price
Lowest daily market multiplier on a deal
Cash multiplier for selling cured (vs wet) buds
Hard cap on a single street deal's payout after all multipliers
Cost of a seed pack at the General Store, per strain
Cost of a plant-food pack at the General Store
Cost of the watering upgrades [Bigger Can, Garden Hose, Drip Sprinklers]
Seconds of hydrated growth from seedling to ripe
Seconds on the drying rack to fully cure
Seconds bone-dry before a plant wilts and dies
Length of the watering pour animation
Hydration lost per second by a growing plant

rampage.description: Base cash for completing a melee frenzy
Extra cash per kill in the goal
Hard cap on the frenzy payout
Seconds before a used skull pickup reappears

rocketRampage.description: Flat cash for passing the rocket frenzy
Seconds you have to destroy the goal cars

overkill.description: Hard cap on overkill income per second
How fast the multiplier climbs while killing
How fast the multiplier decays when idle

dance.description: Crowd tip by letter grade earned

bombShop.description: Cost to arm a car bomb

drugBust.description: Minimum bribe the crooked cop demands when busted dealing weed
Bribe = max(bribeMin, this fraction of the seized stash value), capped at the player's cash
